title: Orb Booster
description: Adds an enchantment that multiplies your gained XP by 10% each level.
body:
**Orb Booster** is a custom enchantment that enhances your XP gains in Minecraft 1.21.5! Whether you're mining blocks or slaying mobs, this enchantment boosts the amount of experience orbs you receive, helping you level up faster and enchant gear more efficiently.

Designed as a fully datapack-driven enchantment, Orb Booster blends seamlessly into vanilla gameplay while offering powerful utility for progression-focused players.

## 🔮 Features
**🔧 Custom Enchantment** – Integrates into vanilla enchantment tables and loot tables

**🧱 XP from Mining** – Break ores and receive bonus XP

**🧟 XP from Mobs** – Slay enemies and get an XP boost

**📈 Stackable Levels** – Higher levels = bigger XP multipliers

**💎 Fully Compatible** – Works in survival, creative, realms, and multiplayer servers

**🔥 No Mods Needed** – 100% datapack, drop it in and play!

## 📦 Installation
1. Download the .zip file from the Files tab
2. Drop it into your world’s /datapacks folder
3. Run /reload in-game or re-enter your world
4. Enchant your gear with Orb Booster and start farming XP!
